objective: Implement a structural researchd coordinator that enforces claim-first, checkpoint durability, trusted artifact ingestion, ledger completion and ExecutionReceipt-last ordering.
executable_blocker: Independent kernel, ledger, CAS and ingestion primitives are green but no mechanical coordinator composes them without false success or receipt-before-durability windows.

interface_contract.constructor: OfflineExecutionCoordinator(kernel, ledger, runner, checkpoint_store, ingestor, *, issuer_id='researchd')
interface_contract.method: execute(job_spec, permit, lease, staging_root, *, now) -> ExecutionRecord
interface_contract.runner_call: runner.run(job_spec, lease, staging_root) exactly once and only after kernel.claim succeeds
interface_contract.checkpoint_rule: D0/D1 CAS ref only, payload_stored_in_domain_vault=false, sequence from runner checkpoint, manifest after CAS plus ledger checkpoint
interface_contract.completion_rule: ledger.complete result_sha256 binds the mechanical checkpoint and artifact refs; ExecutionReceipt.event_chain_head is the returned completion event SHA
interface_contract.failure_rule: any prerequisite failure emits no ExecutionReceipt and no ExecutionRecord; durable earlier checkpoint or artifact orphans may remain but never false success
interface_contract.store_boundary: structural protocols only; no import of l0, CAS, ingestion, kernel or ledger implementation modules

acceptance_commands: public privacy, secret, forbidden-import and exact write-set scan
rollback: Agent 0 reverts the scoped coordinator commit and discards synthetic D0/D1 staging, CAS and ledger fixtures; no domain or external state is mutated.
